name: Interpretation Forecast review for Immune Rejuvenation bundle
summary: The staged outlook interpretation is appropriately conservative. It keeps human_functional_benefit only because older-adult mTOR/TORC1 trials include vaccine-response, infection-rate, and respiratory-illness endpoints, while lowering confidence to low and momentum to mixed because the RTB101 program includes a phase 3 miss and the TRIIM, spermidine, and registry branches remain limited.

findings.claim_or_issue: The public stage depends on immune-function endpoints from a narrow mTOR/TORC1 branch, not on broad aging reversal or replicated durable immune rejuvenation.
findings.why_it_matters: The outlook would overstate the field if the stage were read as a general track-level proof of aging reversal.
findings.recommended_action: No revision needed; the staged outlook already states the mTOR/TORC1 branch limit, phase 3 miss, no-results registries, and durability requirements.
